summary: Completed currency conversion bug fix verification. All backend APIs (10/10 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. USD export sale (EXP-202602-0001) correctly displays AED-converted amounts (66,076.37 AED from USD 18,053.65 @ 3.66 rate).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis - Total sales shows AED 66,076.37 (USD converted)
Backend: GET /api/export-sales - Returns USD sale with exchange_rate 3.66
Backend: GET /api/accounting/reports/receivables - Returns AED amounts with *_aed fields
Backend: Receivables report shows invoice_amount_aed, balance_aed, paid_amount_aed fields
Backend: Receivables summary totals correctly summed in AED
Backend: GET /api/accounting/reports/payables - Returns AED amounts for local purchases
Backend: Currency conversion formula (USD * exchange_rate = AED) verified
Backend: Export sale EXP-202602-0001 correctly converted from USD 18,053.65 to AED 66,076.37
Frontend: Dashboard shows Total Sales AED 66,076.37 (correctly converted from USD)
Frontend: Receivables page loads and displays Outstanding Invoices (1)
Frontend: Receivables shows EXP-202602-0001 with AED 66,076.37 and original (USD 18,053.65)
Frontend: Receivables aging buckets show 1-30 Days: AED 66,076.37
Frontend: Payables page loads and displays Outstanding Bills (2 local AED purchases)
Frontend: P&L Report loads without errors, shows Net Profit AED 350.00
Frontend: Balance Sheet loads without errors, shows Assets/Liabilities/Equity sections
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing export sale EXP-202602-0001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Currency conversion fix verified. Backend converts USD amounts to AED using exchange_rate when creating journal entries and in report endpoints. Frontend displays AED amounts with original currency shown in smaller text. Export sale EXP-202602-0001 (USD 18,053.65 @ 3.66) correctly shows as AED 66,076.37 in Dashboard, Receivables Report. Currently no international purchases exist, so payables shows only local AED transactions.

currency_conversion_receivables.details: USD export sale displays AED amounts with original USD shown

currency_conversion_payables.details: Payables endpoint returns AED fields for international purchases (currently only local AED purchases exist)
currency_conversion_payables.note: No international purchases in test data to verify full conversion display

dashboard_total_sales.details: Dashboard KPIs aggregates export sales with $multiply exchange_rate

balance_sheet_report.details: Report loads without errors, shows balance warning (expected behavior)

backend_implementation.create_sales_journal_entry: Converts amounts to AED using exchange_rate for export sales
backend_implementation.create_purchase_journal_entry: Converts amounts to AED using exchange_rate for intl purchases

frontend_implementation.ReceivablesPage.js: Uses invoice_amount_aed for display with original currency shown in smaller text
frontend_implementation.PayablesPage.js: Uses invoice_amount_aed for display with original currency shown in smaller text
